events.title: Remembrance Day / Armistice Day
events.summary: Observed across the Commonwealth to recall the end of First World War hostilities. It involves a two-minute silence at 11:00 am to honour those who have died in the line of duty.

events.title: Peacemaker Day
events.summary: A day focused on those who work behind the scenes in diplomacy and community mediation to resolve conflicts without violence.

events.title: Origami Day
events.summary: A light-hearted celebration of the ancient Japanese art of paper folding, often used in schools to promote patience and mathematical precision.
